mapper.select: SELECT N.NOTICE_ID AS noticeId, N.TITLE AS title, N.CONTENT AS content, N.NOTICE_TYPE AS noticeType, N.VIEW_CNT AS viewCnt, N.IS_FIXED AS isFixed, N.CREATED_AT AS createdAt, U.USER_NAME AS creatorName FROM TB_NOTICE N LEFT JOIN TB_USER U ON N.CREATOR_ID = U.USER_ID WHERE N.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY N.IS_FIXED DESC, N.CREATED_AT DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_NOTICE ( TITLE, CONTENT, IS_FIXED, NOTICE_TYPE, CREATOR_ID, CREATED_AT, USE_YN ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{content}, #{isFixed}, #{noticeType}, #{creatorId}, NOW(), 'Y' )
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_NOTICE SET TITLE = #{title}, CONTENT = #{content}, IS_FIXED = #{isFixed}, NOTICE_TYPE = #{noticeType}, UPDATED_AT = NOW() WHERE NOTICE_ID = #{noticeId}

UPDATE TB_NOTICE SET USE_YN = 'N' WHERE NOTICE_ID IN
#{id}
